description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a white base and pink decorative icing along the sides, featuring scalloped patterns and piped floral accents. The top of the cake is adorned with several pink buttercream roses and green leaves, giving it a floral and celebratory appearance. There is a message written in pink icing on the top surface, though the text is partially obscured. The cake sits on a gold-colored, fluted-edge cardboard cake board, which provides support and a touch of elegance. The surface of the cake appears soft and creamy, with visible texture from the piped decorations. The overall presentation suggests it is intended for a special occasion, such as a birthday or celebration.
description: A round, single-tier cake with white and pink floral buttercream decorations, displayed on a gold-edged cake board. The cake features piped roses, scalloped icing, and a celebratory message on top.
description_view_0: The cake is seen at an angle, highlighting the pink scalloped icing, floral decorations, and part of the message on top.
description_view_1: This view shows the front with three prominent pink roses and green leaves, as well as the gold-edged cake board.
description_view_2: The cake is viewed from the side, emphasizing the layered icing and the cluster of roses on the left.
description_view_3: A frontal view with the message in pink icing most visible, along with the symmetrical arrangement of roses and scalloped icing.
